tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
edit "attacker-192.168.1.3"
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
edit "icmp-target-wan-7.0.14.254"
set subnet 7.0.14.254 255.255.255.255
next
edit "lan-host-192.168.1.2"
set subnet 192.168.1.2 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall service custom
edit "icmp-service"
set protocol 1
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Deny_ICMP_from_attacker_to_WAN"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "attacker-192.168.1.3"
set dstaddr "icmp-target-wan-7.0.14.254"
set action deny
set service "PING"
set schedule "always"
set logtraffic all
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Allow_other"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "all"
set action accept
set service "ALL"
set schedule "always"
set logtraffic all
next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall address
config firewall address
    edit "none"
        set uuid ee7bab9e-21e1-51f1-415e-a75f4428d225
        set subnet 0.0.0.0 255.255.255.255
    next
    edit "login.microsoftonline.com"
        set uuid ee7bb328-21e1-51f1-dfaa-29963439de12
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "login.microsoftonline.com"
    next
    edit "login.microsoft.com"
        set uuid ee7bb864-21e1-51f1-27a0-1623c8cd443e
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "login.microsoft.com"
    next
    edit "login.windows.net"
        set uuid ee7bbc60-21e1-51f1-f659-dd34d348e591
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "login.windows.net"
    next
    edit "gmail.com"
        set uuid ee7bc084-21e1-51f1-274c-314c62441136
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "gmail.com"
next
    edit "wildcard.google.com"
        set uuid ee7bc494-21e1-51f1-e86c-a66ac2a3eab7
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "*.google.com"
    next
    edit "wildcard.dropbox.com"
        set uuid ee7bc872-21e1-51f1-e261-ea4590a458d3
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "*.dropbox.com"
    next
    edit "all"
        set uuid ef7ef01e-21e1-51f1-b4bd-c1a980a157da
    next
    edit "FIREWALL_AUTH_PORTAL_ADDRESS"
        set uuid ef7ef226-21e1-51f1-da93-94f6aca94ab5
    next
    edit "FABRIC_DEVICE"
        set uuid ef7ef3f2-21e1-51f1-cce7-1fe23f3db30a
        set comment "IPv4 addresses of Fabric Devices."
    next
    edit "SSLVPN_TUNNEL_ADDR1"
        set uuid ef7f8e8e-21e1-51f1-3b0e-a3f701bf4adc
        set type iprange
set start-ip 10.212.134.200
        set end-ip 10.212.134.210
    next
    edit "LAN_subnet"
        set uuid 36df29e2-21e2-51f1-b820-638e33f73368
        set subnet 192.168.1.0 255.255.255.0
    next
    edit "Caldera_Server"
        set uuid 36e20eb4-21e2-51f1-484f-09e4d4e713bf
        set subnet 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.255
    next
    edit "FCTEMS_ALL_FORTICLOUD_SERVERS"
        set uuid 39f2ab2c-21e2-51f1-89c1-3320bb9c134d
        set type dynamic
        set sub-type ems-tag
    next
    edit "attacker-192.168.1.3"
        set uuid 8ed0a0b4-21f0-51f1-26c1-d7eb7926727f
        set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
    next
    edit "icmp-target-wan-7.0.14.254"
        set uuid 8ed68574-21f0-51f1-76cf-366e0eba73dd
        set subnet 7.0.14.254 255.255.255.255
    next
edit "lan-host-192.168.1.2"
        set uuid 8edb450a-21f0-51f1-33f7-85482478d9ac
        set subnet 192.168.1.2 255.255.255.255
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 1
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 36d3d8f8-21e2-51f1-e54f-7fcee4961af8
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "Deny_ICMP_from_attacker_to_WAN"
        set uuid 8ee5f1c6-21f0-51f1-a484-22721e4c549c
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "attacker-192.168.1.3"
        set dstaddr "icmp-target-wan-7.0.14.254"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
        set logtraffic all
    next
edit 3
        set name "Allow_other"
        set uuid 8ef70434-21f0-51f1-9c98-44bfafe54375
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"enable
configure terminal
vlan 10
name HOSTS
exit
interface range Gi0/1 - 4
switchport mode access
switchport access vlan 10
exit
interface Gi0/1
storm-control broadcast level 10.00 5.00
end
write memory"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
enable
Switch#configure terminal
Enter configuration commands, one per line.  End with CNTL/Z.
Switch(config)#vlan 10
Switch(config-vlan)#name HOSTS
Switch(config-vlan)#exit
Switch(config)#interface range Gi0/1 - 4
                                       ^
% Invalid input detected at '^' marker.

Switch(config)#switchport mode access
                ^
% Invalid input detected at '^' marker.

Switch(config)#switchport access vlan 10
                ^
% Invalid input detected at '^' marker.

Switch(config)#exit
Switch#interface Gi0/1
        ^
% Invalid input detected at '^' marker.

Switch#storm-control broadcast level 10.00 5.00
         ^
% Invalid input detected at '^' marker.

Switch#end
